_comment: Real output captured from this simulator against the local Voise Ad Server (2026-06-22). Verdicts are the simulator's honest assessment vs standard ad-server behaviour; GAP means the ad server does not enforce the expected rule.

results.title: Bid Competition (higher CPM should win)
results.actual: Campaign B won 40, Campaign A won 0 (other campaigns: 0). Higher CPM wins as expected.

results.title: Country Targeting (India only)
results.actual: US/UK received the IN-only campaign 20 times. The VAST endpoint accepts no country parameter and the auction evaluates no geo targeting.

results.title: Frequency Cap (3 impressions/user)
results.actual: Same user served 6/6 times; 3 beyond the cap of 3. No per-user frequency capping is enforced.

results.title: Budget Exhaustion
results.actual: Campaign continued serving after its budget should have been exhausted. Eligibility reads `spent` while wins increment `spend`; budget never closes.

evidence.note: spend field mismatch + line-item attribution gap
